series_metadata.series_description: Records includes, but are not limited to; the documentation of telephone calls, texts and/or emails to prevent and alert law enforcement to a school safety crisis. The electronic file or log is created to monitor Information received regarding school safety plans, better learning environments, school fire, safety drills, and the tip line information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 1 year, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
